name: functions
description: Cloud Functions for AI Study Buddy with Genkit

scripts.serve: npm run build && npx --yes firebase-tools emulators:start --only functions
scripts.shell: npm run build && npx --yes firebase-tools functions:shell
scripts.test:gamification:emulator: npm run build && npx --yes firebase-tools emulators:exec --config ../firebase.json --project demo-ai-study-buddy --only firestore,functions "node scripts/gamification-emulator-tests.mjs"
